attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OOD.GL_DATE,
WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OOD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OOD.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE, 
WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OOD.OOD_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OOD
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLONLYDB.EL_OOD_NCR_REV_VAL_REV
WHERE EL_OOD_NCR_REV_VAL_REV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY )

SELECT
WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
,WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNRTCO.CONTEXT
,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
, WNRGLO.LINE_ID
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OOD WNRTCO
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_GET_LINES_OOD WNRGLO
	ON WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WNRGLO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN NAATLA
	ON NAATLA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRTCO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
		AND NAATLA.SS_CODE = WNRTCO.SS_CODE
WHERE WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','CM','DM')
AND EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT_TV   X 
WHERE X.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY =  NAATLA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE = 'O' 
AND CAST(X.END_TV_DATETIME AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'  )

SELECT
NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
MIN(NATLGD.GL_DATETIME) AS GL_DATE,
MAX(NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
MAX(EORCTLG.SEGMENT4) AS FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
MAX(EORCTLG.CODE_COMBINATION_ID) AS OOD_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT EORCTLG
ON EORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OOD WNRTCO WHERE NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRTCO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG = 'N'
AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE = 'REV'
AND EORCTLG.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

SELECT 
NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE  	as ACCOUNT_CLASS,
WNRTCO_1.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE    	AS ACCOUNT_CODE,

/* NAAR.SK_RULE_ID_INT                	as ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, */
CASE WHEN WNRGARO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE (CAST(SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID AS BIGINT), SMFRR_RULE.RULE_ID)
	ELSE COALESCE (CAST(SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID  AS BIGINT),SMFRR_CUR.RULE_ID)
END AS 	ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,

/* WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 			as ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, */
CASE WHEN WNRGARO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  IS NOT NULL THEN WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME                    
	ELSE WNRTCO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME      
END AS 	ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,

case when WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE in ('DM','INV') then NATLGD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT 
	else NATLGD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT
end 	as ACCTD_AMOUNT,
'I' as ACTION_CODE,   
NULL								as ADJUSTMENT_ID,
NULL								as ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
NULL								as ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
case when WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE in ('DM','INV') then NATLGD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT 
	else NATLGD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT
end  as AMOUNT,
1 as BATCH_ID ,     
NULL								as BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL								as BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    as CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
NULL 								as COGS_PERCENT,
NULL 								as COMMENTS,
WNRTCO.CONTEXT						as CONTEXT,
current_timestamp(0) 				as CREATE_DATETIME,
1 								as CREATED_BY,
current_timestamp(0) 				AS CREATION_DATE,
NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT        	AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
WNRSCFO.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG				AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
NULL							AS 	EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
'REV' 							AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
WNRTCO.FISCAL_ID					AS FISCAL_ID, 
'F' 							AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
NULL							AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
current_timestamp(0) 			AS GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
WNRTCO.GL_DATE					AS GL_DATE,
WNRTCO.GL_POSTED_DT 				AS GL_POSTED_DATE,
NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME				AS GLOBAL_NAME,
NULL as GROUPING_ID,
NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT		AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE     	AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
NULL 							AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
NULL 							AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
current_timestamp(0) 			AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
1							AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
'Y' 							AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
NULL 							AS LINE_PERCENT,
NULL 							AS LINE_SEQ_ID 	,		
NULL							AS LINE_TYPE,
NULL 							AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
SSO_DFLT_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  AS 	ORDER_HEADER_ID ,	
WNRGLO.LINE_ID  AS 	ORDER_LINE_ID  ,	
WNRGLO.ORDER_NUMBER				AS ORDER_NUMBER   ,
WNRTCO.ORG_ID					AS ORG_ID,
NULL 							AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NULL 							AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
'Y'								AS QUOTA_FLAG , 
NULL 							AS REASON_CODE,
NULL							AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
NULL							AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
CASE	WHEN WNRTCO.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL 
		ELSE 999
END AS REQUEST_ID,

/* WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE		AS RULE_START_DATE, */
CASE WHEN WNRGARO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  IS NOT NULL THEN WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE        
	ELSE WNRTCO.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE   
END AS 	RULE_START_DATE,

1000			AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,
CASE	WHEN WNRSCFO.METRIX_FLAG ='Y' THEN 12520
		ELSE 1872
END		AS SALES_REP_ID , 
NULL 										AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL 										AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
NULL 										AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
CASE WHEN WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'C' ELSE 'I' END AS SOURCE_TYPE  , 
100							AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,
1161	AS TERRITORY_ID , 
CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= EAMPD.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE EAMPD.END_DATE END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , 
'O' 						AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE, 
CASE WHEN WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' and NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE  = 'LINE' THEN
			NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY 
	 ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY  
END  as TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  ,
WNRTCO.TRX_DATE				AS TRX_DATE,
NULL 						AS TRX_NAME,
WNRTCO.TRX_NUMBER					AS TRX_NUMBER,
WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE      AS TRX_TYPE,
NULL 						AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
NULL						AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
'REV'						AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY	AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
'Direct Sales' AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
CAST (99998 AS VARCHAR(30)) AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 73106 AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
 -999 AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OOD WNRTCO
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON WNRTCO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_GET_LINES_OOD WNRGLO 
	ON WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WNRGLO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
/* ADDING JOIN TO GET SS_CODE */
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL ELOHA
ON ELOHA.ORDER_NUMBER = WNRGLO.ORDER_NUMBER 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OOD WNRTCO_1    
	ON WNRTCO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRTCO_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_GET_ACCT_RULE_OOD WNRGARO
	ON WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WNRGARO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OOD WNRSCFO
	ON WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WNRSCFO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
	on WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY =  NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
	ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY

/* user st_om_ra_rules for rule_id : rchettri	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
	on NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   = WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES    SMRR_RULE	
	ON  SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR	
	ON  SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTCO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_RULES    SMFRR_RULE	
	ON  SMFRR_RULE.NAME  = WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES SMFRR_CUR	
	ON  SMFRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTCO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME	

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON WNRTCO.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON WNRTCO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRTCO.ITEM_KEY )
/*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR
	on ESCT_INIT_VAR.NAME  = 'Direct Sales'
	AND ESCT_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_IF              
	ON ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'FSO Metrix Invoice'	
	AND ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO'  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_I              
	ON ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'MISC. U.S.'	
	AND ESP_INIT_VAR_I.GLOBAL_NAME =  'BO'  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR             
	ON EST_INIT_VAR.TERRITORY_NAME   = 'MISC. U.S.'	
	AND EST_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME =  'BO'  	*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC
	ON WNRGLO.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
AND  NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE  	= ELOHA.SS_CODE /* REMOVING  NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE = 'BV'     */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC
	ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DT EAMPD
	ON CAST(NATLGD.GL_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
WHERE 1=1
	AND  WNRSCFO.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'Y'

SELECT 
NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,NATLGD.AR_TRX_KEY
,NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
, NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  
,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY      
,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY       
,NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
,NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  
,NATLGD.GL_DATETIME AS  GL_DATE
,NATLGD.SS_CODE
,NULL AS  CONTEXT 
,CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' THEN NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY  WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'FREIGHT'  THEN NATFL.PRODUCT_KEY ELSE NULL END ITEM_KEY
, EOAMPD.FISCAL_ID 
, NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
, EORCTLG.GL_POSTED_DATE 
,NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE
,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER
,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DT EOAMPD ,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON NATLGD.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		AND   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='OOD'
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT EORCTLG
	ON EORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT                           
	ON NATLGD.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
	ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT                             
	ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
	ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY  EOOSC
	ON EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME        
		AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE= NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
	ON NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT=EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID
		AND OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD='OOD'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
	ON NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL       
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
	ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
/* commented : rchettri 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR  
	ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME = NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
*/
WHERE  EORCTLG.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
 AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG = 'N'
AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE = 'REV'
AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE='LINE'
AND NAT.AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG = 'Y'
AND  NATLGD.GL_DATETIME  BETWEEN EOAMPD.START_DATE AND EOAMPD.END_DATE
AND  NOT EXISTS 
                 (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_RV_OOD DRVDR
                                                                WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
                                                                AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='REV'
                                                                )

SELECT 
WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
WNRTCO.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
WNRTCO.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE, 
NULL AS CATEGORY_ID,
NULL AS CATEGORY_SET_ID,

CASE	WHEN WNRTCO.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' THEN
			CASE WHEN WNRTCO.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
				 ELSE
					CASE WHEN 	CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
							THEN NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
						 ELSE NULL      
					END
			END
		WHEN WNRTCO.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' THEN
			CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
					THEN NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
				 ELSE NULL
			END
		ELSE WNRTCO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,

CASE 	WHEN WNRTCO.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' THEN
			CASE WHEN WNRTCO.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN WNRTCO_1.GL_DATE       
				 ELSE	CASE	WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
									THEN NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
								ELSE WNRTCO.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
						END
			END
		WHEN WNRTCO.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' THEN
			CASE	WHEN CASE	WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' 
						THEN NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE   
					ELSE WNRTCO.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
			END
		ELSE WNRTCO.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE

FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OOD WNRTCO
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON WNRTCO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OOD WNRTCO_1    
	ON WNRTCO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRTCO_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL_ADJ
	ON NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRTCO.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
	ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON WNRTCO.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
	ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
	AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1
WHERE
	WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
	--AND WNRTCO.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY < 0
	AND (WNRTCO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME IS NULL  OR  WNRTCO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  = 'UNKNOWN')

SELECT
WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
CASE WHEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
	ELSE 
		CASE WHEN WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM') THEN 0 WHEN WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN -9999 END
	END AS LINE_ID,

CASE WHEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
	ELSE
		/* COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) : RCHETTRI */
		CASE WHEN WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM')  AND NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) END
	END AS ORDER_NUMBER
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OOD WNRTCO
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN NAATLA
ON NAATLA.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = WNRTCO.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
AND NAATLA.SS_CODE = WNRTCO.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NAATLA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON WNRTCO.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_AR
ON NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY

SELECT
WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
,WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNRTCO.CONTEXT
,CASE WHEN WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 'C' ELSE 'I' END SOURCE_TYPE  
, NULL SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,CASE WHEN WNRTCO.CONTEXT = 'METRIX' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END METRIX_FLAG
,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OOD WNRTCO
WHERE 1=1
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OOD Y WHERE  WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = Y.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY)

SELECT 
NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE   as ACCOUNT_CLASS,
WNRTCO_1.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE      AS ACCOUNT_CODE,

/* NAAR.SK_RULE_ID_INT                 as ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, */
CASE WHEN WNRGARO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE (CAST(SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID AS BIGINT), SMFRR_RULE.RULE_ID)
 ELSE COALESCE (CAST(SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID  AS BIGINT),SMFRR_CUR.RULE_ID)
END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,

/* WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME    as ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, */
CASE WHEN WNRGARO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  IS NOT NULL THEN WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME                    
 ELSE WNRTCO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME      
END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,

case when WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE in ('DM','INV') then NATLGD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT 
 else NATLGD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT
end         as ACCTD_AMOUNT,
'I' as ACTION_CODE ,
NULL        as ADJUSTMENT_ID,
NULL        as ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
NULL        as ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
case when WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE in ('DM','INV') then NATLGD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT 
 else NATLGD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT
end         as AMOUNT,
1 as BATCH_ID ,
NULL        as BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL        as BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    as CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
NULL         as COGS_PERCENT,
NULL         as COMMENTS,
WNRTCO.CONTEXT      as CONTEXT,
current_timestamp(0)     as CREATE_DATETIME,
1         as CREATED_BY,
current_timestamp(0)     AS CREATION_DATE,
NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT         AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
WNRSCFO.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG    AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE    = 'LINE' THEN
   CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'CREDIT' THEN NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  END 
  WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE    = 'TAX' THEN
   CASE WHEN NATTL.TAX_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE              = 'CREDIT' THEN NATTL.RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT            ELSE NATTL.RU_TAX_DEBIT_AMOUNT    END 
 WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE    = 'FRIEGHT' THEN
  CASE WHEN NATFL.FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE  = 'CREDIT' THEN NATFL.RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT  ELSE NATFL.RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT   END 
END        AS  EXTENDED_AMOUNT ,
'REV'        AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
WNRTCO.FISCAL_ID     AS FISCAL_ID,
'F'        AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
WNRTCO.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE  AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
current_timestamp(0)    AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
WNRTCO.GL_DATE     AS GL_DATE,
WNRTCO.GL_POSTED_DT     AS GL_POSTED_DATE,
NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME    AS GLOBAL_NAME,
NULL as GROUPING_ID ,
NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT  AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE      AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
NULL        AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
NULL        AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
current_timestamp(0)    AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
1       AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
'Y'        AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
NULL        AS LINE_PERCENT,
SC_TV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT   AS LINE_SEQ_ID  , 
NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE  AS LINE_TYPE,
NULL        AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
CASE  WHEN SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD             ='O' THEN SSO_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
  ELSE SSO_DFLT_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
END  AS  ORDER_HEADER_ID  ,        
CASE WHEN  WNRGLO.LINE_ID = -9999  THEN 
    CASE WHEN SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD             = 'O' THEN NSOL_SC.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
      ELSE NULL
    END
  ELSE WNRGLO.LINE_ID
END AS ORDER_LINE_ID ,   
WNRGLO.ORDER_NUMBER    AS ORDER_NUMBER   ,
WNRTCO.ORG_ID     AS ORG_ID,
NULL        AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NULL        AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
COALESCE(NSCTT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG,'=')      AS QUOTA_FLAG  , 
NULL        AS REASON_CODE,
NULL       AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
NULL       AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
CASE WHEN WNRTCO.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL 
  ELSE 999
END AS REQUEST_ID,

/* WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE  AS RULE_START_DATE, */
CASE WHEN WNRGARO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  IS NOT NULL THEN WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE        
 ELSE WNRTCO.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE   
END AS  RULE_START_DATE,

SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT    AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID  , 
SC_TV.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT    AS SALESREP_ID , 
NULL       AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL      AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
NULL      AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD                  AS SOURCE_TYPE,   
SC_TV.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT  AS SPLIT_PERCENT , 
SC_TV.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT   AS TERRITORY_ID , 
CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= EAMPD.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE EAMPD.END_DATE END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
'O'       AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
CASE WHEN WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' and NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE  = 'LINE' THEN
   NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY 
  ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY  
END  as TRANSACTION_QUANTITY ,
WNRTCO.TRX_DATE    AS TRX_DATE,
NULL       AS TRX_NAME,
WNRTCO.TRX_NUMBER     AS TRX_NUMBER,
WNRTCO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE      AS TRX_TYPE,
NULL       AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
NULL      AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
'REV'      AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,
SC_TV.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
SC_TV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SC_TV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT  SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_TRX_CUR_OOD WNRTCO
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON WNRTCO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_GET_LINES_OOD WNRGLO 
 ON WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WNRGLO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
 /* ADDING JOIN TO GET SS_CODE   */
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL ELOHA
ON ELOHA.ORDER_NUMBER = WNRGLO.ORDER_NUMBER 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_VAL_REV_OOD WNRTCO_1    
 ON WNRTCO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRTCO_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_GET_ACCT_RULE_OOD WNRGARO
 ON WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WNRGARO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_REV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OOD WNRSCFO
 ON WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WNRSCFO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
 on WNRTCO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY =  NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
 ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
/* use rule_id from st_om_ra_rules ; rchettri
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
 on NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   = WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
*/ 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES    SMRR_RULE 
 ON  SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
 ON  SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTCO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_RULES    SMFRR_RULE	
	ON  SMFRR_RULE.NAME  = WNRGARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES SMFRR_CUR	
	ON  SMFRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRTCO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME	 
 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON WNRTCO.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON WNRTCO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
 ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
 ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TAX_LINE NATTL
 ON NATTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRTCO.ITEM_KEY ) 
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN NAATLA
 ON NAATLA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY           

/* Changed as part of Sales Credits changes */
/*LEFT OUTER JOIN   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT_TV  SC_TV 
 ON SC_TV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY =  NAATLA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE = WNRSCFO.SOURCE_TYPE 
 AND SC_TV.SS_CODE =  'BV'
 AND SC_TV.END_TV_DATETIME  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'   */

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV SC_TV
 ON SC_TV .RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NAATLA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD     = WNRSCFO.SOURCE_TYPE 
 AND  SC_TV.END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'

/*LEFT OUTER JOIN  ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESR
 ON(SC_TV.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER=ESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER 
  AND ESR.GLOBAL_NAME='BO') 
LEFT OUTER JOIN ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
 ON(SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE=ESCT.NAME 
  AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
LEFT OUTER JOIN ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST_HIER
 ON (SC_TV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=EST_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
  AND EST_HIER.GLOBAL_NAME='BO'  ) */

/* Changed as part of Sales Credits changes */ 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCTT
 ON SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
 AND NSCTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
 
 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC
 ON SC_TV.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC
 ON NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC
 ON WNRGLO.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  
AND NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE =ELOHA.SS_CODE /* REMOVING NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE ='BV' */ 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC
 ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DT EAMPD 
    ON CAST(NATLGD.GL_DATETIME AS DATE) BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
WHERE 1=1
AND  WNRSCFO.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'N'
